description:
The Bazecor configurator software allows you to remap any key and create up to 10 fully programmable layers for your Dygma Raise keyboard. It also allows you to create and manage superkeys, macros, and shortcuts.


Hello, Dygmates
Today, we have a small Bazecor release with updated dependencies and, most importantly, the ability to flash the new Defy 2.0 and Raise 2 1.2 firmware.
Before updating the firmware, remember:
- The new firmware updates the neuron, the keyscanners, and the RF Gateways. If the keyboard stays dark after the process is finished, don’t turn it on and off; let it be for 20-30 seconds.
- Your layers might not be restored after the update. To recover them, go to Preferences > Backups > Restore from last Backup
- If the process is stuck for more than 2 or 3 minutes, you can close Bazecor, reconnect the keyboard and start again
- Updating the firmware will reset your Bluetooth connections; you'll need to forget the keyboard in your System's preferences and pair it again.
If anything goes wrong, you can manually flash the firmware with the flasher tools as explained here: https://support.dygma.com/hc/en-us/articles/15272957832477-How-to-charge-my-Dygma-keyboard-power-consumption-information
What's Changed
- Upgrade dependencies and unlock flashing 2.0fw by @alexpargon in #1011
Full Changelog: v1.6.4...v1.6.5
